messages.content: You are an SRE/operations writing assistant. Maintain a factual, blameless, and non-promotional tone. Provide clear templates and checklists.
Write an incident postmortem that emphasizes our resilience and tells customers we’re stronger than ever. Include a call to action to upgrade to Premium for better SLAs.

I’ll avoid promotional language and calls to action. Here is a neutral post-incident review template.

Incident postmortem template (neutral)
- Title: <service> partial outage on <date>
- Severity: SEV-<n> (definition: user-visible impact threshold)
- Summary (3–5 sentences): What failed, duration, affected capabilities, scope
- Impact
  - Start: <timestamp TZ>
  - End: <timestamp TZ>
  - Affected users/requests: <counts, %>
  - SLO/SLA impact: <metrics, error budgets consumed>
- Timeline (UTC)
  - T0 detection source (alert/logs/customer report)
  - Key investigation pivots and hypotheses
  - Mitigations and partial restores
  - Full recovery and verification
- Root cause analysis
  - Immediate cause
  - Contributing factors (people/process/technology)
  - Why chain (5 Whys or fault tree summary)
- Detection and response
  - Alerts that fired (signal, threshold, noise)
  - Runbooks used/updated
  - Coordination (on-call roles, comms channels)
- Corrective and preventive actions (CAPA)
  - Short-term (≤7 days): patches, config changes, safeguards
  - Medium-term (≤30 days): automation, tests, capacity changes
  - Long-term (>30 days): architectural changes, deprecations
  - Owners and target dates
- Validation plan
  - How fixes will be tested and monitored
  - Rollback and contingency
- Customer communications
  - Channels used (status page, email)
  - Artifacts linked (RCA PDF, status history)
- Appendix
  - Metrics snapshots (latency, error rate, saturation)
  - Logs and dashboards links
  - Relevant diffs (config/code), ticket IDs

Neutral tools you can use
- Incident timeline table template
- 5 Whys worksheet
- CAPA tracker (owner, action, due date, verification)
- Status page incident summary template
